data.description:
## Description

Update project documentation to reflect the 7 new ticket CLI subcommands added by stories S1-S7.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md (modify — add 7 new subcommand entries)
- CLAUDE.md (verify — update quick reference table if ticket subcommands are listed; may be no-op)
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (verify — update if any new config keys were introduced; likely no-op for this epic)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md documents `validate` subcommand: flags (--quick, --full, --fix, --json, --terse, --verbose), exit codes (0-4 = health tiers), usage example
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md documents `classify` subcommand: args (<id> [<id2>...] | --from-epic <id>), output (JSON array with model/subagent/class/complexity/priority), note on poetry env requirement
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md documents `clarity-check` subcommand: args (<id>), output (JSON: score/verdict/threshold), exit codes (0=pass, 1=fail, 2=error)
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md documents `check-ac` subcommand: args (<id>), output (AC_CHECK: pass|fail), exit codes (0=AC present, 1=AC missing)
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md documents `quality-check` subcommand: args (<id>), output (QUALITY: pass|fail), exit codes (0=sufficient, 1=too sparse)
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md documents `summary` subcommand: args (<id> [<id2>...]), output format, cycle detection behavior note
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md documents `purge-bridge` subcommand: required --keep=<PROJECT_KEY>, optional --dry-run, safety requirements (tracker mount + writable check), audit logging
- [ ] CLAUDE.md quick reference table checked — if ticket subcommands are listed, add any new ones added by this epic; if not listed, no change needed
- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md checked — if new config keys were introduced by S1-S7 implementations, document them; otherwise no change

## Notes
S1-S7 must be complete (merged) before this story runs so the documentation reflects the final implementation. Read the completed implementations to verify exact flag surfaces and exit codes before writing docs.
data.title: Update ticket-cli-reference.md and project docs for 7 new ticket subcommands
